page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2c.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. The system features 96 dedicated physical cores utilizing the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. This configuration operates with a single thread per core, providing 96 independent vCPUs. It is equipped with 352.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.67 GB of RAM per core.

A defining characteristic of this instance is its bundled local storage, which consists of 47,674 GB of HDD capacity. This massive local storage volume is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps. The absence of a GPU and the reliance on mechanical hard drives rather than solid-state drives indicates a design optimized for high-capacity sequential data access rather than low-latency random I/O.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.d2c.24xlarge offers a high density of local storage relative to its compute and memory resources, making it a viable option for workloads requiring massive data retention without the premium cost of solid-state storage. Appropriate workloads include large-scale data warehousing, distributed file systems, cold data archiving, log processing, and big data analytics frameworks that benefit from high-capacity local storage and substantial parallel processing power.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2c.24xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz with a single thread per core. It is equipped with 352.0 GB of system memory and a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps. A key feature of this instance is its integrated local storage, providing 47,674 GB of HDD capacity. This hardware profile is designed for storage-intensive applications that require significant sequential storage capacity alongside substantial compute resources. The qualitative cost efficiency of this instance lies in its high storage-to-compute ratio, offering a cost-effective alternative to solid-state storage for large-scale data retention. It is suited for distributed file systems, big data analytics, data warehousing, and log processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2c.24xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 47,674 GB of local HDD storage for large-scale data processing.

tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and over forty-seven terabytes of local HDD storage for data-intensive processing.

352.0 GB of system memory providing 3.67 GB per core.
47,674 GB of integrated local HDD storage for high-capacity data retention.
35 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for efficient data transfer.
Optimized for distributed file systems, big data analytics, and log processing.
